chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1833 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 28.02.2024 Mr. Mujahid Hussain Phulpoto, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Agha Athar Hussain Pathan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Private respondents No.12, 17 & 18 are present and file their comments. There appears to be a dispute between the parties over measurement of land in Survey No.948, 949, 950, 951 and 154, total area about 20-14 acres, situated in Deh Sorah, Taluka Nara, District Khairpur. Learned AAG undertakes that a proper demarcation would be carried out in presence of the parties and dispute between them would be resolved. Let such exercise be conducted within a period of one month and report be submitted before this Court for a perusal in chamber. The petition, in above terms, is disposed of. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
